name: deployment_manager
description: Deployment management skill for planning deployments, validating bundles, generating serverclass.conf, and checking version compatibility.
author: ObsAI Team

splunk_version.description: Target Splunk version for compatibility checks

actions.name: plan_deployment
actions.description: Create a phased deployment plan for configuration changes including rollback procedures.

changes.description: Description of the configuration changes to deploy

actions.name: validate_bundle
actions.description: Validate a deployment bundle for common issues such as missing files, syntax errors, and configuration conflicts.

bundle_contents.description: Description or listing of bundle contents (files and directories)

actions.name: generate_serverclass
actions.description: Generate serverclass.conf configuration from deployment requirements for the Splunk deployment server.

requirements.description: Description of deployment requirements (e.g., 'deploy TA-windows to all Windows servers, deploy TA-linux to Linux hosts')

actions.name: check_compatibility
actions.description: Check version compatibility of Splunk apps and add-ons against a target Splunk version.

apps.description: Comma-separated list of app names and versions (e.g., 'Splunk_TA_windows:8.0.0, Splunk_SA_CIM:5.1.0')

target_version.description: Target Splunk version to check compatibility against
